_comment: TEMPLATE for backend:"service" (conventions §18; docs/HUB-ARCHITECTURE.md). Copy to your PRODUCT repo root as `.mcp.json` (or pass via `claude --mcp-config`). Replace <ABS-PATH-TO-dev-loop> with the absolute path to your dev-loop checkout. The ${VAR} values are expanded by Claude Code at config-parse time from each pane's launching shell, so a per-pane `DEVLOOP_ACTOR` makes the one hub server attribute that pane's writes to the right agent (per-agent identity — the whole point). Defaults after `:-` apply if the launcher didn't set the var.
